column1: I really have to go now. My plane___________at 10:30. (LEAVE)
We_________to the cinema tomorrow afternoon. Would you like to come with us? (GO)
I______________in my bedroom at the moment, but I can join in the park later. (STUDY)
I______________dinner this evening, so please don't be late. (COOK)
He____________a book about the high cost of living. (WRITE)
